sentences.target: On prépare la noce pour samedi.

translations.fr: On prépare la noce pour samedi.
translations.en: We’re preparing the wedding party for Saturday.
translations.es: Estamos preparando la fiesta de la boda para el sábado.
translations.de: Wir bereiten die Hochzeitsfeier für Samstag vor.
translations.it: Stiamo preparando la festa di nozze per sabato.
translations.ko: 토요일에 있을 결혼 파티를 준비하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们正在为周六的婚宴做准备。
translations.yue: 我哋正準備星期六嘅婚宴。
translations.ru: Мы готовим свадебное торжество на субботу.
translations.pt: Estamos preparando a festa de casamento para sábado.
translations.he: אנחנו מכינים את מסיבת החתונה לשבת.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang chuẩn bị tiệc cưới cho thứ Bảy.
translations.ar: نحن نُحضّر حفلة الزفاف ليوم السبت.
translations.nl: We zijn het huwelijksfeest voor zaterdag aan het voorbereiden.
translations.uk: Ми готуємо весільне святкування на суботу.
translations.hi: हम शनिवार के लिए शादी की पार्टी की तैयारी कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Ετοιμάζουμε τη γαμήλια δεξίωση για το Σάββατο.
translations.id: Kami sedang menyiapkan pesta pernikahan untuk hari Sabtu.
translations.sv: Vi förbereder bröllopsfesten till på lördag.
translations.ro: Pregătim petrecerea de nuntă pentru sâmbătă.
translations.da: Vi forbereder bryllupsfesten til på lørdag.
translations.ja: 土曜日の披露宴の準備をしています。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun; 3rd person singular impersonal/colloquial 'we'. Functions as subject of 'prépare'.
Main verb; present indicative 3rd person singular. Transitive; takes 'la noce' as direct object and is modified by the PP 'pour samedi'.
Definite article; feminine singular; determiner of 'noce'.
Common noun; feminine singular; direct object of 'prépare'.
Preposition introducing a temporal/target complement; here marks the scheduled time.
Noun (day of the week), masculine; object of 'pour'; denotes the target day.

sentences.target: Tu vas à la noce demain.

translations.fr: Tu vas à la noce demain.
translations.en: You’re going to the wedding party tomorrow.
translations.es: Mañana vas a la fiesta de la boda.
translations.it: Domani vai alla festa di nozze.
translations.ru: Ты завтра идёшь на свадебное торжество.
translations.pt: Você vai à festa de casamento amanhã.
translations.vi: Ngày mai bạn đi dự tiệc cưới.
translations.ar: أنت ذاهب إلى حفلة الزفاف غدًا.
translations.nl: Morgen ga je naar het huwelijksfeest.
translations.uk: Ти завтра йдеш на весільне святкування.
translations.hi: तुम कल शादी की पार्टी में जा रहे हो.
translations.nb: Du skal på bryllupsfest i morgen.
translations.id: Besok kamu pergi ke pesta pernikahan.
translations.sv: I morgon går du på bröllopsfest.
translations.ro: Mâine mergi la petrecerea de nuntă.
translations.da: Du skal til bryllupsfest i morgen.
translations.ja: あなたは明日披露宴に行きます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 2nd person singular; subject of 'vas'.
Main verb; present indicative 2nd person singular of 'aller'; lexical motion verb here (not auxiliary).
Preposition introducing a locative/directional complement.
Definite article; feminine singular; determiner of 'noce'.
Common noun; feminine singular; object of the preposition 'à' (destination/goal).
Temporal adverb modifying the clause; indicates time.

translations.en: I like dancing at the wedding party.
translations.es: Me gusta bailar en la fiesta de la boda.
translations.de: Ich tanze gern auf der Hochzeitsfeier.
translations.it: Mi piace ballare alla festa di nozze.
translations.ru: Мне нравится танцевать на свадебном торжестве.
translations.pt: Eu gosto de dançar na festa de casamento.
translations.vi: Tôi thích nhảy ở tiệc cưới.
translations.nl: Ik dans graag op het huwelijksfeest.
translations.uk: Мені подобається танцювати на весільному святкуванні.
translations.hi: मुझे शादी की पार्टी में नाचना पसंद है.
translations.el: Μου αρέσει να χορεύω στη γαμήλια δεξίωση.
translations.nb: Jeg liker å danse på bryllupsfesten.
translations.id: Saya suka menari di pesta pernikahan.
translations.sv: Jag tycker om att dansa på bröllopsfest.
translations.ro: Îmi place să dansez la petrecerea de nuntă.
translations.da: Jeg kan godt lide at danse til bryllupsfesten.
translations.ja: 披露宴で踊るのが好きです。

tokens.explanation: Contraction of clitic subject 'je' + verb 'aime'; 1st person singular present indicative of 'aimer'. Main predicate taking the infinitive 'danser' as complement.
Verb in the infinitive; complements 'J’aime' as the activity liked (xcomp).
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article; feminine singular; determiner of 'noce'.
Common noun; feminine singular; object of 'à' indicating the venue.

sentences.target: La noce commence dans une heure.

translations.fr: La noce commence dans une heure.
translations.en: The wedding party starts in an hour.
translations.es: La fiesta de la boda comienza en una hora.
translations.de: Die Hochzeitsfeier beginnt in einer Stunde.
translations.it: La festa di nozze inizia tra un’ora.
translations.ko: 결혼 파티는 한 시간 후에 시작해요.
translations.pt: A festa de casamento começa em uma hora.
translations.tr: Düğün eğlencesi bir saat sonra başlıyor.
translations.vi: Tiệc cưới bắt đầu sau một giờ nữa.
translations.nl: Het huwelijksfeest begint over een uur.
translations.hu: A lakodalom egy óra múlva kezdődik.
translations.hi: शादी की पार्टी एक घंटे में शुरू होगी.
translations.pl: Przyjęcie weselne zaczyna się za godzinę.
translations.el: Η γαμήλια δεξίωση ξεκινά σε μία ώρα.
translations.id: Pesta pernikahan mulai dalam satu jam.
translations.ro: Petrecerea de nuntă începe peste μία oră.
translations.ja: 披露宴は一時間後に始まります。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; feminine singular; determiner of 'noce'.
Common noun; feminine singular; subject of 'commence'.
Main verb; present indicative 3rd person singular; intransitive predicate meaning 'to begin'.
Preposition marking time until an event; introduces the measure phrase.
Indefinite article; feminine singular; determiner of 'heure'.
Common noun; feminine singular; object of the preposition 'dans'; temporal measure.
